narrative.summary:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Nassau Ave at Humboldt St — corner spot, former Polish grocery

The pandemic pop-up that became one of NYC's most sought-after tortilla destinations.

blocks.title: Arrival
blocks.body:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Nassau Ave at Humboldt St — corner spot, former Polish grocery

The pandemic pop-up that became one of NYC's most sought-after tortilla destinations.

blocks.title: Space
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗦𝗣𝗔𝗖𝗘

Big, bright, family-friendly. The tortilla station is right at the counter — watch Jorge roll them to order.

blocks.title: Drinks
blocks.body:
𝗗𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦

$15 cocktails — made with Mexican agave spirits, balanced for the food.

🍸 Signatures:
• Desert Negroni — Cardenxe sotol, botanical, smoky
• Picafresa — strawberry-tequila-mezcal, spicy-sweet
• Coco Carajillo — topped with coconut cream, dark chocolate
• Cadillac Margarita

🍺 Caguamas: 32oz Carta Blanca or Tecate wrapped in Mexican newspaper

blocks.title: Food
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗨

𝗧𝗮𝗰𝗼𝘀 (flour tortillas made with Sonoran wheat + lard) $5-7
• Carne con Chile — $7 ⭐
• Frijoles y Queso — $5 ⭐
• Pork Chicharrón — $7, with pickled onion
• Taco of the Day — rotating

𝗣𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀 $17-24
• Frijoles con Veneno — $22, refried beans with carne con chile, tortillas ⭐
• Costillas en Salsa Verde — pork ribs, zesty sauce, beans, rice, tortillas
• Mushroom Al Pastor Gringa — $22, cheesy, folded, piña-habanero salsa ⭐
• Tacos de Nada — $18, potato corn tortillas, tomato broth, queso fresco

𝗦𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗹 𝗣𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀
• Guacamole Norteño — $17, with pork belly chicharrónnes + Oaxacan tlayuda

Note: Flour from Molino La Fama in Hermosillo, Sonora — the real thing. Breakfast tacos coming soon (gas pending).

blocks.title: Check
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗖𝗞

💰 $$

Dinner for 2: $70-90 (with drinks)

Reservations: Walk-in only — no reservations, neighborhood-first

🌐 bordertown.co
📸 @bordertownbk

𝗛𝗢𝗨𝗥𝗦
Wed–Thu: 5–10pm
Fri: 5pm–midnight
Sat: 3pm–midnight (bar opens 3pm)
Sun: 3–9pm (bar opens 3pm)
Mon–Tue: Closed

𝗕𝗘𝗦𝗧 𝗧𝗜𝗠𝗘𝗦
• Early weeknight (5–6pm Wed/Thu): Beat the crowd, same tortillas
• Weekend afternoon (3pm): Start with drinks at the bar, stay for dinner
• Avoid: Friday/Saturday dinner rush — this place packs out

blocks.title: Travel Intel
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗥𝗔𝗩𝗘𝗟 𝗜𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗟

From: The Crosby Street Hotel, 79 Crosby St, New York, NY 10012, USA
To: 189 Nassau Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11222

• walking: 1 hour 18 mins • 3.5 mi
• transit: 33 mins • 4.8 mi
• driving: 18 mins • 4.2 mi (traffic: 18 mins)
• bicycling: 25 mins • 4.1 mi

Best modality: DRIVING ⭐
Why: Fastest available option (18 mins)

travel.origin: The Crosby Street Hotel, 79 Crosby St, New York, NY 10012, USA
